positive: A mystical woodland creature, a graceful stag with glowing ethereal antlers and fur that resembles twilight mist, standing in a sun-dappled forest clearing. The composition is centered and symmetrical, designed for a large print print. Style: Neo-whimsical illustration with strong, clean lines and a limited, harmonious color palette of deep emerald green, midnight blue, and soft gold. Strong backlighting creates dramatic silhouettes and glowing edges. The background details should be stylized and non-distracting, focusing attention on the magnificent stag. High contrast, vector art quality finish, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, dirty, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low detail
